content: calculate pipe wall thickness

Required inputs:
- material (M): Required to determine the material properties for thickness calculation as per ASME B31.3 §302.2.
- design_temperature (T): Required for evaluating the material strength and allowable stress at operating conditions as per ASME B31.3 §302.1.
- design_pressure (P): Required by ASME B31.3 §304.1.1 for thickness calculation.
- outside_diameter (D): Required to calculate the wall thickness based on the external dimensions of the pipe as per ASME B31.3 §304.3.
material: astm a106, temperature: 85 Celcius

calculate pipe wall thickness

Before expanding ASME B31.3 §304.1.1 (B313-304.1.1), confirm the following assumption:

Pipe wall thickness applies to a straight section of pipe.

  Choose one:
    1. Yes — straight pipe section (supported)
    2. No — fitting or bend (not yet supported)

  Reply with the option number (1–2) (e.g. yes), or type your choice.

Input required (pressure_loading) — Is the pipe subjected to internal or external pressure? Internal pressure design uses §304.1.2; external pressure design uses §304.1.3. Coefficients E, S, W, and Y are defined in §304.1.1(b).

  Choose one:
    1. Internal pressure — design per §304.1.2 (node B313-304.1.2)
    2. External pressure — design per §304.1.3 (node B313-304.1.3)

  Reply with the option number (1–2) (e.g. internal pressure), or type your choice.

Based on your inputs — straight pipe section, internal pressure loading — the following formula will be evaluated which will calculate the pressure design thickness t for straight pipe under internal pressure using the thin-wall pressure design equation.

Formula:
  t = PD / 2(SEW + PY)

Known parameters:
  (none yet)

Missing parameters:
  P
    Description: Internal design gage pressure
    Needed: provide P or confirm the proposed default.

  D
    Description: Outside diameter of pipe as measured
    Needed: requires NPS for lookup value from dimensions in ASME B36.10 or specify the outside diameter directly (e.g. D: 4 inch or NPS: 10)

  S
    Description: Stress value from Table A-1 at design temperature
    Needed: looked up from Table A-1 at design metal temperature. requires material specification. requires design temperature.

  E
    Description: Quality factor from Tables A-1A and A-1B
    Needed: default is 1.0. Confirm or enter another value (e.g. E: 1.0).
    Choose one:
      1. Confirm default (E = 1.0)
      2. Enter a different value (e.g. E: 1.0)

  W
    Description: Weld strength reduction factor per para. 302.3.5(e)
    Needed: default is 1.0. Confirm or enter another value (e.g. W: 1.0).
    Choose one:
      1. Confirm default (W = 1.0)
      2. Enter a different value (e.g. W: 1.0)

  Y
    Description: Coefficient from Table 304.1.1 (t < D/6) or thick-wall equation
    Needed: default is 0.4. Confirm or enter another value (e.g. Y: 0.4).
    Choose one:
      1. Confirm default (Y = 0.4)
      2. Enter a different value (e.g. Y: 0.4)

Please provide or confirm all missing parameters.
You may reply with symbol-labeled values, for example:
  P: 8 bar
  D: 4 inch
  NPS: 10
  Reply with the option number (1–2) (e.g. 1), or type your choice.
8 bar
